# Geometry ‚Äî Standalone Curriculum Spec

## 1. Overview

**Purpose:** A self-contained, standalone Geometry course with structured lessons, tiered practice (easy/medium/hard), and unit quizzes.  
**Entry point:** `geometry.html` (generated by `build-geometry.js` from source HTML).  
**Data source:** Inline `GEOMETRY_CURRICULUM` array in `geometry.html`, built from `/Users/robn/Downloads/geometry-curriculum.html` with injected `deeperLinks`.  
**Relation to other offerings:**

| Offering | Type | Entry Point |
|---|---|---|
| Essential Math Primer | Sequential K‚Äì12 lessons (15 min each) | `primer.html` |
| MAP Test Prep | Endless MAP-style MCQ practice | `map-prep.html` |
| Algebra I Curriculum | Full course: 11 units | `algebra-i.html` |
| Algebra II Curriculum | Full course: 12 units | `algebra-ii.html` |
| **Geometry Curriculum** | Full course: 13 units, lessons + practice + quiz | `geometry.html` |
| Topic Library | Individual topic lessons/walkthroughs/practice | `math/<topic>/` |

---

## 2. Data Model

### 2.1 Unit object

Each item in `GEOMETRY_CURRICULUM` has:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | number | Unit number 1‚Äì13 |
| `title` | string | Unit title |
| `obj` | string | Learning objectives summary |
| `deeperLinks` | array | `{ label, url }` ‚Äî injected by build; cross-links to `math/<topic>/walkthrough.html` |
| `prs` | array | `{ id, text }` ‚Äî prerequisite background notes |
| `ls` | array | Lessons; see ¬ß2.2 |
| `pr` | array | Practice questions; see ¬ß2.3 |
| `qz` | array | Quiz questions; see ¬ß2.4 |

### 2.2 Lesson object (`ls[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | string | Lesson title |
| `c` | string | Lesson content (HTML/text) |
| `f` | string[] | Formula strings (monospace) |
| `ex` | object | Optional `{ p: string, s: string[] }` ‚Äî worked example problem and steps |

### 2.3 Practice question object (`pr[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `d` | string | `'easy'` \| `'medium'` \| `'hard'` |
| `q` | string | Question text |
| `o` | string[] | Answer options |
| `c` | number | Index of correct option |
| `x` | string | Explanation (shown after answering) |

### 2.4 Quiz question object (`qz[]`)

Same shape as practice minus `d`; explanation shown only after quiz submission.

---

| # | Unit Title | Lessons | Practice Qs | Quiz Qs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Foundations of Geometry | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 2 | Angles & Angle Relationships | 2 | 7 | 5 |

| 4 | Congruent Triangles | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 5 | Relationships in Triangles | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 6 | Similarity | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 7 | Right Triangles & Trigonometry | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 8 | Quadrilaterals & Polygons | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 9 | Transformations | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 10 | Area & Perimeter | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 11 | Surface Area & Volume | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 12 | Circles | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| 13 | Coordinate Geometry & Proofs | 2 | 7 | 5 |
| **Total** | | **26** | **91** | **65** |

---

## 4. App State

### 4.1 In-memory (session)

- `STATE.currentUnit` ‚Äî index of the currently displayed unit (0‚Äì12).
- `STATE.currentTab` ‚Äî `'lesson'` \| `'practice'` \| `'quiz'`.
- `STATE.answers` ‚Äî `{ [key]: optionIndex }`. Key format: `"<unitIndex>-p-<qi>"` for practice, `"<unitIndex>-q-<qi>"` for quiz.
- `STATE.quizSubmitted` ‚Äî `{ "<unitIndex>-qz": true }`.
- `STATE.completedUnits` ‚Äî `Set<number>` of unit indices that passed the quiz.

### 4.2 Persisted

**`localStorage` key:** `geometry-progress`  
**Shape:**
```json
{
  "answers": { "<unitIndex>-p-<qi>": 0, "<unitIndex>-q-<qi>": 2, ... },
  "quizSubmitted": { "<unitIndex>-qz": true, ... },
  "completedUnits": [0, 3, 7]
}
```
Loaded on init, saved after every answer and quiz submission.

---

## 5. Grading Logic

### 5.1 Practice

- `answerQ(key, option)`: records answer; re-renders showing explanation and styling immediately.
- Guard: if already submitted (or quiz and not yet submitted), respect lock/selected state.

### 5.2 Quiz

- Quiz answers use key `-q-<i>`; explanations hidden until `submitQuiz()`.
- `submitQuiz()`: requires all questions answered. Sets `STATE.quizSubmitted["<unitIndex>-qz"] = true`.
- Score ‚â• 60% ‚Üí unit added to `STATE.completedUnits` (nav shows ‚úì U<n>).
- `retakeQuiz()`: clears quiz answers, submission, and completion for the current unit.

---

## 6. Navigation & UI

- **Unit nav bar** (U1‚ÄìU13): `on` = current unit, `ok` = passed quiz (green border + ‚úì).
- **Tabs**: Lessons ¬∑ Practice ¬∑ Unit Quiz.
- **Overall progress bar**: completed units / 13 units.
- **"Go Deeper" panel**: `deeperLinks` per unit ‚Üí `math/<topic>/walkthrough.html`.
- **Footnotes**: prerequisite notes for the current unit.
- **Back link**: `‚Üê Back to Main App` ‚Üí `index.html`.
- **Theme**: Teal accent (`#0d9488`, `#14b8a6`); respects `mathbored-theme` from localStorage.

---

| 11 | Surface Area |

| 13 | Distance Formula, Coordinate Plane, Slope |

---

## 8. Build

- **Script:** `build-geometry.js`
- **Source:** `GEOMETRY_SOURCE` env or default `/Users/robn/Downloads/geometry-curriculum.html`
- **Output:** `geometry.html`
- **Steps:** Read source HTML ‚Üí extract `const D=[...];` ‚Üí inject `deeperLinks` at each unit end (regex for `]\n},\n// ‚ïê‚ïê` and last unit `]\n}\n];`) ‚Üí wrap with site header/footer, styles, and app script.

---

## 9. Integration Points

- `primer.html`: "Also Try" section includes Geometry card linking to `geometry.html`.
- `index.html` header tagline: includes `<a href="geometry.html">‚ñ≥ Geometry</a>` (with Algebra I ¬∑ Algebra II ¬∑ Geometry grouping where applicable).
- SEO: title, meta description, canonical URL, and JSON-LD Course schema in `geometry.html`.

---

## 10. Relation to Algebra I / Algebra II

| Aspect | Algebra I | Algebra II | Geometry |
|---|---|---|---|
| Entry point | `algebra-i.html` | `algebra-ii.html` | `geometry.html` |
| localStorage key | `algebraI-progress` | `algebraII-progress` | `geometry-progress` |
| Units | 11 | 12 | 13 |
| Accent | blue | purple `#a855f7` | teal `#0d9488` / `#14b8a6` |
| Quiz key suffix | `-quiz` | `-qz` | `-qz` |

All three are standalone curriculum pages with shared header/footer, progress persistence, and "Go Deeper" / cross-links where applicable.
